after parking in lot. walk straight over bridge tressle. go left walk 1/2 mile or so and on the right along the bog embankment there are tons of blueberry bushes. bring a big basket.

lots of berries in fall- October usually great.  varies though with weather. 
There are also cranberries in the bogs which used to be harvested by Ocean Spray but now smaller farmers are doing that. Don't try and scoop them, there are signs not to do that and
